Robotics Control

ROS 2

Physical AI

System Engineering

On this page

ROS 2 ​

This section collects ROS 2-specific engineering notes: executors and callback groups, launch patterns, lifecycle usage, performance measurement, and packaging choices that survive continuous integration and field deployment.

Posts emphasize reproducible setups and operational signals (latency, CPU, message drops) rather than tutorial rewrites of upstream documentation.

Edit this page on GitHub
